summary: This document details an 18-month project plan for KeepMeCompany, outlining six work packages that cover clinical validation, EHR integration, AI development, and pilot implementation. It specifies milestones, dependencies, deliverables, and includes a risk register matrix addressing technical, clinical, and commercial threats with mitigation strategies. The plan emphasizes regulatory compliance, patient safety constraints, and resource coordination for NHS GP practice deployment.
